description: NPM Audit Exception Configuration - Documents accepted security vulnerabilities with mitigation strategies

dev-tooling.reason: These modules are transitive dev/build dependencies (eslint-plugin-sonarjs>minimatch) that do not impact runtime code in the packaged Electron app. Module-level ignore is used instead of advisory IDs because IDs change across npm versions.
mitigation: All affected packages are only used during development, packaging, or static analysis, not at runtime in the Electron app.
Electron production bundles do not ship npm tooling or eslint internals.
Build and CI environments are treated as trusted and isolated.
We will upgrade tooling (eslint stack, sonarjs plugin, etc.) as compatible patched versions become available.

build-and-dev-tooling.reason: ID-based exceptions for advisories that cannot be covered by module-ignore (e.g., app-level dependencies). Keep empty when all current advisories are handled by moduleIgnore.
actionItems: Re-run npm audit monthly and attempt dependency upgrades.
Revisit this exception set before expiry date (2026-09-04).

svelte-ssr-only.reason: Previously tracked Svelte SSR-only advisories; all fixed or no longer reported for current toolchain. Keeping the bucket for future dev-only SSR issues if they reappear.
